title: NIOT Junior Translation Officer Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
organization: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT), Chennai
short_info: NIOT is recruiting 01 Junior Translation Officer post with Master’s Degree qualification, last date 15 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 35 years Age relaxation applicable for Central Govt. employees, Ex-servicemen, and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities as per Government of India rules. Crucial date for age calculation: Closing date of online application.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application. | Essential Qualification: | Master’s degree of a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at degree level OR Master’s degree in English with Hindi as compulsory/elective subject OR Master’s degree in any subject other than Hindi/English with Hindi/English medium and relevant language subjects at degree level OR Recognized Diploma/Certificate course in Translation from Hindi to English & vice versa AND Two years of experience of translation work from Hindi to English and vice versa in Central/State Government Offices or PSUs. | Job Requirements: | Translation of official documents, publications, books, handbooks, brochures Proof reading of translations Implementation of Official Language Policy Organizing Hindi workshops and meetings Maintaining glossaries and terminology database

selection_process: Written Examination (Objective/Descriptive) Skill Test (Qualifying in nature)
Final selection will be made on the basis of marks obtained in the Written Examination from among those who qualify the Skill Test. Both tests will be conducted at NIOT Chennai only.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the official NIOT recruitment portal: https://niot.res.in/recruitment_details.php
